2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 31 iv) Set of mounting arrangement for position transmitter for one 1 set IP control valve (Complete set comprising of bellows, bushes, couplers, pins, lock washers, position detector) 9.2.6 Drain Valves with Actuators 10% of each type and size 9.2.7 Gland Steam System i) Turbine gland steam supply valves (c omplete set of internals 1set required to form one valve assembly except outer body) ii) Turbine gland steam leak-off valves (complete set of internals 1 set required to form one valve assembly except for outer body) iii) Valves for gland steam seal system 1 no. of each type and size 9.2.8 Turning Gear i) Gear internal with shafts, bearing, bushes, lock washers, 1 set oil seals, ‘O’ rings ii) 25% nozzle segments and moving blades and complete 1 set set of sealing strips with caulking material (if hydraulically operated) 9.2.9 Turbine Governing and Protection System i) Hydraulic speed governor 1set (complete set of internals required to form one speed governor assembly except for outer casing) ii) Electro hydraulic converter for governing system 1set (complete set of internals required to form one convertor assembly except for outer casing) iii) Follow up pistons for governing system (complete 20% of each replacement in governing system of one turbine) type and size iv) Hydraulic amplifier for governing system (complete 1 set set of internals required to form one hydraulic amplifier assembly except for outer casing) v) Over speed trip testing device (complete set of internals 1 set required to form one device assembly except outer body) vi) Main trip valve assembly 1 no.
